chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 2015 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For orders on CMA No.7492/2024 (Ex.A) 3. For orders on CMA No.7493/2024 (S/A) 4. For hearing of main case 01.09.2025 Mr. Achar Khan Gabol, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Learned counsel for the Petitioner, under instructions, does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
